prompt:
Subject: a girl laughing at a bar during a trip / Fujifilm vacation portrait
Person/Expression: A woman in her early 20s, black hair tied back loosely with natural wisps around the face, translucent skin, natural makeup, eyes narrowed in a bright and genuine laugh, intimate eye contact as if taken by a friend.

Clothing/Pose: Loosely wearing a white linen shirt over a simple ivory camisole, a thin chain necklace, and small earrings; holding two polaroid photos of herself to her chest with both hands, in a playful pose with a slight shrug of the shoulders.

Background/Lighting: A tropical resort bar lounge, wooden counter, rattan chairs, blurred bottles and glasses in the background, a faint view of the ocean outside the window, warm light bulb bokeh, a half-drunk cocktail and a folded napkin on the table, soft bar lighting combined with natural evening light.

Composition/Camera: Vertical waist-up portrait, person centered, composition where both hands and the two polaroid photos are clearly visible, 35mm lens, f2.0, shallow depth of field, focus on the face and the photos, with a creamy background bokeh.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture, realistic hands and glossy finish on the photos, Fuji Classic Chrome, Fujifilm color science, soft warm tones in the style of Pro 400H, fine film grain, slight halation, candid photography style like a photo taken by a close friend.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, extra fingers, distorted body, malformed face, duplicate persons, text, logos, watermarks, readable menu text, unnatural polaroid borders, excessive skin smoothing, anime style, doll-like.
